creator: olli@lurza.secnetix.de
text:
Well, I found one more bug.  Sigh.

There's a free() call missing in the fsys_getfsstats.c file.
I have updated the two patch files (see the URLs posted in
my previous reply).  Please re-fetch them to the port's
"files" directory and rebuild.  This will fix one memory leak
for sure, but there might be more leaks hidden elsewhere.

Best regards
   Oliver
